main.description: An identification suggestion for an existing observation. Used to propose or agree with a taxonomic identification.

occurrence.description: A strong reference (CID + URI) to the occurrence being identified.

scientificName.description: The full scientific name, with authorship and date information if known (Darwin Core dwc:scientificName).

taxonRank.description: The taxonomic rank of the identification (Darwin Core dwc:taxonRank).

kingdom.description: Taxonomic kingdom for disambiguating homonyms (Darwin Core dwc:kingdom).

identificationRemarks.description: Explanation or reasoning for this identification (Darwin Core dwc:identificationRemarks).
